title: Vicloon Silicone Air Fryer Liners, 2PCS 7.87x5.31 Square Reusable Silicone Mats, Non-Stick Air Fryer Mats for Baking, Steaming, Cooking
features: 🥟【Safe and Healthy】The air fryer liner is made of high quality food grade silicone material, BPA free, measures 20×13.5cm/7.87x 5.31 inches, can withstand high heat resistance (450 °F/230 °C) Air fry, steam and oven bake, the silicone mat is specially designed to line the air fryer to keep the fryer basket clean and tidy.

🥟【Reusable】Silicone air fryer mats are an alternative to parchment paper, these reusable air fryer liners are designed to protect your air fryer basket and prevent food from sticking, giving you a reusable parchment liner alternative Taste.

🥟【Perforated Design】The inner lining of the air fryer is perforated to ensure optimal airflow around the food for even heat distribution and to prevent burning. All holes in the fryer lining In conjunction with how an air fryer or steamer works, enough of the proper holes help to speed up the circulation of steam in the air fryer or steamer.

🥟【Non-stick and Easy Clean】These reusable air fryer mats are non-stick, so food won't stick to the pads, and even if they would, you can easily clean them with warm water, or just wash them and put them in the dishwasher. Helps protect the non-stick coating, extending the life of your air fryer basket.

🥟【Compatibility】The square air fryer basket liner is compatible with the Ninja Foodie DualZone air fryer. Many people like to use them as a tripod, oven or as a grip for opening cans. Comes with 2 air fryer liners, feel free to contact us if you have any questions about our products or packaging.
